executive_summary.purpose: Consolidate the Supabase cleanup discovery decision register for STOCK_ZERO without DB access, SQL execution, archive, deprecation, or destructive action.
executive_summary.status: Discovery is decision-registered as NO_DROP. The second pass supersedes the first-pass cleanup candidate posture.

stop_unknown_objects.reason: Claude-challenged object; no downstream/runtime proof, but SQL/evidence references exist.
Possible coupling to resuelta/latest_week path; insufficient evidence for deprecation.
Possible coupling to resuelta path; insufficient evidence for deprecation.
High-risk mart view; no runtime/downstream proof strong enough for action.
Public view; low confidence and high risk. Protected by default.
Public selector-like view; absence from local runtime search is not proof of non-use.

protection_rule.name: NO_DROP_BY_DEFAULT
protection_rule.rule: If evidence is incomplete, contradictory, low-confidence, public-facing, or high-risk, classify as STOP_UNKNOWN and do not drop, delete, truncate, archive, deprecate, or alter.
applies_to: all raw and mart objects unless a future authorized retention policy proves otherwise

evidence_required_before_any_future_phas: Human review of all 6 STOP_UNKNOWN objects.
Runtime/API usage check for public selector and public CG views.
Directed dependency replay for challenged cg_core and cg_mart views.
Explicit backup and restore plan before any archive or destructive proposal.
Fresh read-only catalog snapshot immediately before any future decision phase.
Explicit Bastian authorization naming the exact future command and phase.
Separate preflight confirming read-only or approved write mode, as applicable.
